series_metadata.series_description: Application for commission as Special Police Officer certifying the applicant''s qualifications as described in O.R.C. 4973.17. A permanent record of special police officer and their terms of office is maintained in a Record of Speical Police Officers (D300-03). The term of office of a special police officer is three (3) years. Maintained as electronic file.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office area four (4) years
